title: Delicate Tangy Croatian Bun Sandwich
description: A tangy and pillowy Croatian dish featuring a soft bun, nuka-pickle, and jain-friendly ingredients, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This sandwich is a delightful combination of flavors and textures.
instructions: Preheat a panini press or grill to medium heat.
Slice the Croatian buns in half and toast until lightly browned.
Spread a layer of vegan mayonnaise on the bottom half of each bun.
Top the mayonnaise with a layer of shredded lettuce.
Add a layer of sliced tomato, red onion, and cucumber on top of the lettuce.
Spoon the finely chopped nuka-pickle over the vegetables.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Place the top half of the bun on each sandwich and press gently.
Cook in the panini press or grill for 2-3 minutes, or until the bun is toasted and the filling is heated through.
Refrigerate and consume within 1 week — this preparation is not shelf-stable without an approved acid level and canning process.

Refrigerator pickle only: store in the fridge and consume within 1 week. For shelf-stable canning, add at least 2 tablespoons of vinegar (5% acidity) per cup of brine and follow a tested water-bath process.
